entities.name: OAT
entities.description: Avena sativa L., the crop evaluated for biomass yield and stability

entities.name: BIOMASS YIELD
entities.description: The amount of dry matter produced per hectare, used as the primary productivity measure

entities.name: STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of a genotype's performance across different environments

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to perform well across multiple environments

entities.name: AMMI
entities.description: Additive main effect and multiplicative interaction analysis used for stability and yield evaluation

entities.name: GGE BIPLOT
entities.description: Genotype and genotype-environment interaction biplot analysis used for genotype selection

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to plant and evaluate genotypes

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical technique used to analyze the genotype-environment interaction

entities.name: GENOTYPE-ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The combined effect of genetic factors and environmental conditions on trait expression

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the oat genotypes were evaluated

entities.name: G6
entities.description: A high-yielding, stable, and ideal oat genotype

entities.name: G5
entities.description: A stable and widely adapted oat genotype

entities.name: G7
entities.description: A low-yielding and unstable oat genotype

entities.name: MEGA-ENVIRONMENT IDENTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of identifying environments with similar responses to genotypes
